description: AI-native session intelligence CLI tool — indexes coding session transcripts, provides semantic search, and generates context forks for new sessions.

userStories.title: Create project scaffolding and pyproject.toml
userStories.description: Initialize the SmartFork v2 Python project with pyproject.toml, directory structure, and development dependencies.
acceptanceCriteria: pyproject.toml with all dependencies from architecture spec

userStories.title: Implement all data models, enums, and protocols
userStories.description: Create SessionDocument, SearchResult, ResultCard, RawSessionData, RawTurn, QualityTag, SearchIntent, ForkIntent, all Pydantic models and protocols.

userStories.title: Implement LLM provider system (Ollama + Anthropic + OpenAI)
userStories.description: Build pluggable LLM backends with Protocol interface. Default: Ollama (local). Cloud: Anthropic/OpenAI (opt-in with API keys).
acceptanceCriteria: OllamaLLM class with complete() and complete_structured()
Graceful error when Ollama not installed
Graceful error when cloud API key missing

userStories.title: Implement embedding provider system (Ollama + SentenceTransformers + OpenAI)
userStories.description: Build pluggable embedding backends. Instruction-aware prefixes per doc_type. Embedding model change guard.

userStories.title: Implement configuration system (TOML + Pydantic + secrets)
userStories.description: SmartForkConfig with Pydantic validation, TOML storage, secrets.env for API keys, legacy JSON migration.
acceptanceCriteria: SmartForkConfig BaseSettings class with all fields

userStories.title: Implement adapter base class and registry
userStories.description: SessionAdapter ABC with RawSessionData/RawTurn contracts. @register decorator. Registry functions.
acceptanceCriteria: SessionAdapter ABC with agent_id, display_name, session_type
RawSessionData dataclass with all fields from spec

userStories.title: Implement Kilo Code adapter
userStories.description: Parse Kilo Code 3-file session format (task_metadata.json + api_conversation_history.json + ui_messages.json). Extract file signals, conversation turns, reasoning blocks.
acceptanceCriteria: Content cleaning (remove file_content, env_details, code blocks)
IDE path detection (Cursor, VS Code, AntiGravity)
All tests pass with fixture test data

userStories.title: Implement Claude Code adapter
userStories.description: Parse Claude Code .jsonl session format. Handle Claude's tool_use blocks. Scan project folder structure.
acceptanceCriteria: parse_raw() handles Claude tool_use blocks (list content)
Extract file signals from read_file/write_file tools
All tests pass with fixture .jsonl data

userStories.title: Implement OpenCode adapter (SQLite-based)
userStories.description: Parse OpenCode SQLite database. Query session, message, part tables. Extract reasoning and tool calls.
acceptanceCriteria: Extract user content from text parts
Extract assistant content from reasoning + tool parts
All tests pass with fixture SQLite data

userStories.title: Implement remaining adapters (Cursor, AntiGravity, Cline, Gemini)
userStories.description: Register placeholder adapters for Cursor Agent, AntiGravity, Cline, and Gemini. AntiGravity wraps KiloCode with different paths.

userStories.title: Implement SessionParser with project extraction
userStories.description: Generic parser that takes RawSessionData from any adapter → SessionDocument. Zero-LLM derivation of project name, domains, languages, layers, session pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Works with all adapter output formats
All tests pass with each adapter fixture

userStories.title: Implement chunking system (message-boundary + contextual)
userStories.description: MessageBoundaryChunker (never splits messages or code blocks). ContextualChunker (adds Anthropic-style context headers). Factory function.
acceptanceCriteria: Code block detection (40% code lines, fence markers)
Code blocks NEVER split across chunks
Reasoning block splitting at sentence boundaries

userStories.title: Implement embedding pipeline with ChromaDB integration
userStories.description: EmbeddingPipeline: chunk → embed with instruction prefix → upsert to ChromaDB. Batching, retry, progress reporting.

userStories.title: Implement SQLite metadata store
userStories.description: MetadataStore with full schema. CRUD for sessions. Supersession links. Stats queries. Hard filtering for pre-search.
acceptanceCriteria: Complete SQLite schema with all tables and indexes
upsert_session() with JSON serialization for list fields
Query methods: by project, domain, quality, agent
get_stats() with breakdown by project, quality, agent
All tests pass with sample data

userStories.title: Implement index-time intelligence (quality tags, tech tags, titling, summarization)
userStories.description: LLM-powered enrichment: session titling, 3-sentence summarization, quality tagging, tech tagging, proposition extraction. Graceful fallbacks.
acceptanceCriteria: Proposition extraction: atomic facts from reasoning (max 3 blocks)
All steps degrade gracefully when LLM unavailable

userStories.title: Implement supersession detection and annotation
userStories.description: Detect when newer sessions supersede older ones. Regex-based resolution status. Post-search annotation with visual indicators and chain following.
acceptanceCriteria: Candidate filtering (same project, overlapping domains, older)
Edge case guards (self-supersession, unknown_project, short tasks)
Resolution status detection via regex patterns

userStories.title: Implement full indexer (FullIndexer + SessionScanner + Watcher)
userStories.description: Orchestrates the complete indexing pipeline: scan → parse → chunk → embed → store → enrich. Supports full and incremental indexing.
acceptanceCriteria: Error handling: skip bad sessions, continue pipeline

userStories.title: Implement deterministic search engine (Path A)
userStories.description: Fast, free, always-available search: query parse → embed → vector + BM25 → RRF fusion → metadata filter → rerank → result cards.
acceptanceCriteria: SearchCache with TTL and session invalidation

userStories.title: Implement agentic search engine (Path B) — query understanding + parallel search
userStories.description: PydanticAI agent for query understanding + Smolagents workers for parallel multi-variant search. Steps 1-2 of the agentic pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: PydanticAI query_agent with QueryDecomposition structured output
3-5 search variants generated from natural language query
Smolagents workers (5 parallel) with different search strategies
Workers: vector_only, bm25_only, hybrid_balanced, hybrid_bm25_heavy, metadata_focused
Fallback to deterministic when Ollama not available

userStories.title: Implement agentic search engine — evaluation, refinement, synthesis
userStories.description: PydanticAI agents for result evaluation, refinement loop, and recommendation synthesis. Steps 3-5 of the agentic pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: eval_agent: reads top candidates, rates relevance 0-10, explains why
refinement agent: generates new search variants when nothing above threshold
Empty result when nothing found after 3 rounds
synth_agent: natural language explanations for each result
Full pipeline: understand → search → evaluate → refine → synthesize

userStories.title: Implement fork assembly system (hybrid reference-first + context extraction)
userStories.description: Handoff document generation using hybrid approach: reference external artifacts (Matt Pocock pattern — never duplicate what exists elsewhere) + extract session-specific reasoning (SmartFork's unique value). ArtifactDetector finds PRDs/commits/issues/ADRs. 4 intents with focused section templates per intent.
acceptanceCriteria: ForkAssembler with assemble() method accepting user_query for focus-driven handoffs
4 intents: CONTINUE, REFERENCE, DEBUG, SYNTHESIZE with distinct section templates
ArtifactDetector: finds git commits, PRDs, spec files, issues, ADRs from session context
Reference-first rule: NEVER duplicate artifact content — reference by path/URL
Handoff output: Artifacts to Reference + What Was Happening + Decisions Made + Current State (✅/🚧/❌ checklist) + Key Files with Status + Gotchas/Warnings + Skills Suggested + Next Steps
DEBUG intent adds: Error Encountered, What Was Tried, Root Cause, Fix Applied, Prevention
SYNTHESIZE intent adds: Overview, Timeline, Architectural Shifts
LLM mode: agent produces structured handoff with natural explanations
Raw fallback: same section structure assembled without LLM
Compaction gap analysis when pre-compaction export exists
Supersession warnings in handoff when session was superseded
ForkExporter: save to file (handoff_{id}_{intent}.md), clipboard, MCP delivery

userStories.title: Implement Obsidian vault generator
userStories.description: Auto-generate Obsidian-compatible knowledge vault with MOC, session notes, Mermaid graphs, Dataview queries, project MOCs.
acceptanceCriteria: Session notes with YAML frontmatter (all fields)
MOC.md with Mermaid graph + Dataview queries

userStories.title: Implement CLI commands (all 12 commands)
userStories.description: Typer-based CLI with setup, index, search, detect-fork, fork, status, vault, config, theme, watch, mcp, shell commands.
acceptanceCriteria: search and detect-fork with all flags
fork with 4 intents and export options

userStories.title: Implement Textual TUI screens and widgets
userStories.description: Fullscreen TUI with MainScreen, SearchScreen, ForkScreen, StatusScreen, SetupWizardScreen, CommandPalette, and 6 CSS themes.
acceptanceCriteria: MainScreen with command input + results area
6 CSS themes (phosphor, obsidian, ember, arctic, iron, tungsten)
CLI fallback when Textual not installed

userStories.title: Implement MCP server
userStories.description: MCP server for Claude Code integration. Expose detect_fork, fork_session, index_status, search_sessions, and other tools.
acceptanceCriteria: MCP server with 8 tools (detect_fork, fork_session, etc.)
smartfork mcp install command (auto-configure Claude Code)
Read-only tools except config_set and vault_export

userStories.title: Write comprehensive test suite and test fixtures
userStories.description: Unit tests for all components, integration tests for pipelines, agentic tests with mock LLM, adapter tests with fixture data.
acceptanceCriteria: conftest.py with mock_llm, mock_embedder, temp_db, temp_chroma fixtures
Test fixtures: kilocode session, claudecode .jsonl, opencode.db
Unit tests for all pure functions (80%+ coverage)
Edge case tests (empty, corrupt, unicode, large)

userStories.title: Implement edge case handling and graceful degradation
userStories.description: Every component handles failure gracefully. User-friendly error messages, fallback paths, no traceback crashes.
acceptanceCriteria: Ollama missing/not-running → clear error + fix instructions
Cloud API key missing → clear error + alternatives
Corrupt session files → skip + log, don't stop pipeline
Unicode fallback for Windows legacy terminals
